title: Fleur d'oseille
writer: Michel Audiard, Marcel Jullian, Georges Lautner
actors: Mireille Darc, Anouk Ferjac, Fanny Robiane
plot: Catherine is left unmarried and pregnant when her mobster sweetheart is killed in this gangster comedy. With the help of another unmarried mother-to-be, Catherine goes looking for the stash of cash buried by her lover before his d...
